title: crotalaria ctenoides
intro: Crotalaria ctenoides, also known as the hairy rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria ctenoides include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria ctenoides can be made through infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
